name: SquishyMuffinz
oneLine: Canadian Rocket League world champion turned full-time content creator and Cloud9 co-owner.
bio: Mariano Arruda, born November 29, 2000, started playing Rocket League in the 2015 beta and became one of the most decorated players in the game's history, winning a world championship and five Major LANs over a career that earned roughly $500,000 in prize money. He retired from professional competition in 2024 and rejoined Cloud9 as a content creator and co-owner, with around 1.4 million YouTube subscribers and 1.2 million Twitch followers focused on freestyling, ranked play and high-level Rocket League content.
notable: RLCS career with NRG and Cloud9
